title: In the Name of Fire
overview: In the remote outskirts of Manorva village, Rukhiya, Phekan, and their son Karimana live on society's margins, enveloped by the haunting melodies of Kirtan prayers. Phekan, a humble laborer, struggles against poverty, while resilient Rukhiya tenderly nourishes their child despite scarce resources.
